name: pesquisaDistribuicao
code:
SELECT CAST(P.VALOR AS CHAR) AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM PESQUISAS P WHERE ('{{mes}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 7) = '{{mes}}')
AND ('{{dataInicio}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 10) >= '{{dataInicio}}')
AND ('{{dataFim}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(P.DATA_RESPOSTA, 1, 10) <= '{{dataFim}}')
GROUP BY P.VALOR ORDER BY P.VALOR
